body: Contract: ssot conformance cases shall be grouped by registry, document, id, SPEC-to-ADR, feature-to-SPEC, proof-chain, boundary, and release concerns. Cases shall evaluate a target repository against its SSOT registry and .ssot artifacts in a language-agnostic way. Features remain spec-aware through feature spec_ids. SPEC entities shall not own feature_ids.

title: SSOT conformance case contract
